title: nephrodium polylepis
intro: Nephrodium polylepis, also known as the Polypody fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium polylepis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Nephrodium polylepis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the dried leaves in hot water or by combining them with other medicinal herbs.
